title: sesamum marlothii
intro: Sesamum marlothii, also known as Marloth's sesame or the African sesame bush, is a flowering plant species in the genus Sesamum that is native to southern Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a high concentration of sesamin, a lignan that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The seeds of Sesamum marlothii have been reported to have health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
